# DAY-207. Robots policy for https://dayseam.github.io.
#
# Posture is "fully indexable, no crawl-rate hints". The site is a
# few static pages; there is no high-cost surface that would benefit
# from rate-limiting Googlebot, no auth-walled directory that needs
# disallowing, and no staging assets shipped to /public. Everything
# under the docroot is intended to be indexed.
#
# The Sitemap directive points crawlers at the auto-generated
# sitemap-index that @astrojs/sitemap emits on each build. Linking
# the sitemap from robots.txt is the canonical way to advertise it
# to crawlers that don't have it pre-registered in Search Console
# (Bing, Yandex, Brave Search, etc.). Google itself can pick it up
# either via this file or via the explicit submission in Search
# Console — both are belt-and-braces, neither hurts.
#
# When the apex moves to https://dayseam.com, flip both the host
# in the Sitemap URL and the SITE_URL in deploy.yml; the rest of
# the file stays valid.

User-agent: *
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://dayseam.github.io/sitemap-index.xml
